description: A subsea engineer plans an intervention on a subsea well using a remotely operated vehicle (ROV) to replace a faulty sensor.

nodes.task_description: Identify the faulty sensor and the specific ROV tooling required to replace it.

expected_outcome.expected: The correct replacement part and ROV tools are identified.

nodes.task_description: Develop a detailed, step-by-step procedure for the ROV to perform the replacement operation.

expected_outcome.expected: A safe and efficient work procedure is written.

nodes.task_description: Book a vessel with an ROV and schedule the intervention in the offshore operational plan.

expected_outcome.expected: The vessel and crew are booked, and the job is added to the 90-day plan.
